title: scabiosa macedonica var. lyrophylla
intro: Scabiosa macedonica var. lyrophylla, also known as small scabious, is a flowering plant species in the genus Scabiosa, characterized by its delicate blue or white flowers and slender foliage. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Scabiosa macedonica var. lyrophylla include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can also be used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
